_README: sourceUrls of photos that must never be cached as SpeciesImage rows: Gemini 3.5 Flash (npm run images:assess) flagged them as drawings, dead/beach-cast specimens, or wrong-subject. refresh-images.ts skips any iNat/Wikimedia candidate whose sourceUrl is a key here (editorial overrides bypass it). Generated 3 Jun 2026 from the catalogue sweep.
